spirit:component.spirit:name: srio_gen2_5g_2x_8b

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: CONDENSED_IO_TX
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Condensed I/O Port Transmit Signal List

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: CONDENSED_IO_RX
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Condensed I/O Port Receive Signal List

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: USER_IO_TX
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: User-Defined Port Transmit Signal Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: USER_IO_RX
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: User-Defined Port Receive Signal Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: INITIATOR_REQ
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Initiator/Target Request Port Signal Slave Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: INITIATOR_RESP
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Initiator/Target Port Responce Signal Master Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: TARGET_REQ
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Initiator/Target Port Request Signal Master Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: TARGET_RESP
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Initiator/Target Port Responce Signal Slave Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: WR_SLAVE_T_RESP
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: WR Slave T Response Port

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: MAINT_IF
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Maintenance Port Signal Slave Interface

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: LOG_CLK_IN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Log Local Clock input in Non Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: LOG_CLK_OUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Log Local Clock output in Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: PHY_CLK_OUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Phy Clock output in Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: PHY_CLK_IN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: PHY clock input in Non Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: GT_PCS_CLK_IN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT PCS Clock output in Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: GT_PCS_CLK_OUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT PCS Clock output in Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: GT_CLK_IN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT clock input in Non Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: GT_CLK_OUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT Clock output in Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: DRPCLK_IN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT clock input in Non Shared Mode

xilinx:isEnabled.xilinx:dependency: (spirit:decode(((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 0)) or ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 0)) or ((((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7')) and (((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'IES') and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '2') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '4')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '6.25') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '3.125')))) )and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 0))))

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: DRPCLK_OUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT Clock output in Shared Mode

xilinx:isEnabled.xilinx:dependency: (spirit:decode(((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1)) or ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1)) or ((((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7')) and (((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'IES') and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '2') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '4')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '6.25') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '3.125')))) )and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1))))

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: REFCLK_IN
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT clock input in Non Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: REFCLK_OUT
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: GT Clock output in Shared Mode

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: CORE_DEBUG
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Core Control and Debug Signal List

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: SIDE_BAND_SIGNALS
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Side band signal List

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: TRANSCEIVER_DEBUG
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Transceiver Control and Debug Signal List

xilinx:isEnabled.xilinx:dependency: (spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES'))) or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu'))))

(spirit:decode(((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 0)) or ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 0)) or ((((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7')) and (((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'IES') and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '2') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '4')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '6.25') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '3.125')))) )and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 0))))

(spirit:decode(((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1)) or ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1)) or ((((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7')) and (((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'IES') and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '2') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '4')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '6.25') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '3.125')))) )and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1))))

(spirit:decode((((((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') )and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') != 'IES') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1) and (id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '6.25')) or ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1) and (id('PARAM_VALUE.transfer_frequency') = '6.25'))) and (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vx690t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xq7vx690t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xq7vx330t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xq7vx980t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vx980t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vx330t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vx415t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vx550t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vh580t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vh870t') and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') != 'xc7vx1140t')))) or ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_support_level') = 1) and (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_LINK_WIDTH') != 1) and (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vx690t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vx980t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xq7vx690t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xq7vx330t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xq7vx980t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vx330t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vx415t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vx550t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vh580t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vh870t') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_device') = 'xc7vx1140t'))))))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES'))) or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu'))and (id('PARAM_VALUE.link_width') = '4')))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES'))) or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu'))))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'artix7') and (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production')) or (((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES'))) or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu'))))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES'))))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtex7') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynq') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu')) and ((id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'Production') or (id('PARAM_VALUE.silicon_rev') = 'GES'))))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu'))))

(spirit:decode((id('PARAM_VALUE.c_transceivercontrol') = 1 ) and ((id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexu') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'zynquplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'kintexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplusHBM') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexuplus58g') or (id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_family') = 'virtexu'))))

spirit:enumeration.spirit:text: Include Shared Logic in Example Design

spirit:component.spirit:description: The Xilinx v4.0 Serial RapidIO Gen 2 Solution consists of Physical, Buffer and Logical Layer cores designed to the RapidIO v2.2 spec. Reference designs and development scripts are provided to support development of a customized, fully compliant system.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: CHANNEL_ENABLE
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Indicate whether this transceiver channel is instantiated and enabled for use

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: c_transceivercontrol
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Additional transceiver control and status ports

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: INS_LOSS_NYQ
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Indicate the transmitter to receiver insertion loss at the Nyquist frequency, in dB

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: RX_EQ_MODE
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Specify the equalization mode, or allow the core to select a mode. Refer to the product guide for guidelines on selecting between DFE and LPM modes.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: RX_TERMINATION_PROG_VALUE
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Select the termination voltage (in mV) when in programmable mode

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: RX_PPM_OFFSET
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: PPM offset between receiver and transmitter
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Specify the PPM offset between received data and transmitted data
